productDisplayName: Basics Men Blue Slim Fit Striped Shirt
description: CompositionBlue and white striped full-sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has a mock faded effect in two tones of blue, a tipped collar with buttons and a full front buttoned placket, two chest pockets, full sleeves, brown stitch detailing on the sides just above the hem, and has a curved hemline FittingSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWarm iron only, but do not iron directly on print/embroideryStripes that add immense attitude to your wardrobe is what basics brings into your life. The full sleeves are sure to keep the winter chill at bay, and you can roll them up to suit your style. Team this shirt with jeans and sports shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
